imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Simple single person icon silhouette in dark color on transparent background (user-single.dim_128x128.png)

existing_features.title: Replace the user icon image in the attack path template with a single person icon in a simple icon style (silhouette or outlined figure). This icon should serve as a visual element only with no interactive behavior.

new_feature_requests.summary: Update user icon in attack path template to single person icon style (visual element only)

projectName: Update user icon to single person style in attack path template
